result.summary: Found 2 issues: a critical content mismatch in the Exclusive Games section, and a major text truncation in the navigation menu.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays '0 Games' in the counter, but 6 exclusive game cards are visibly displayed below the header. This creates a misleading contradiction.
issues.suggestion: Update the game counter to accurately reflect the number of exclusive games being displayed (should show '6 Games' instead of '0 Games')

issues.description: The navigation menu item 'Hot Gar' is visibly truncated and incomplete, likely should read 'Hot Games' or similar full label.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the navigation menu items have sufficient space to display full text labels, or implement text wrapping/responsive adjustments for smaller screens
